steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states: “people will always remember that Aloha Wanderwell was the first woman to drive herself around the world.” This is the key signal—being the first is what endures in historical memory.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Prevail over” means to triumph over or surpass. In the phrase “there is little that can prevail over being the first to do something,” this creates exactly the meaning the passage needs: nothing surpasses being first in gaining historical significance. The other choices describe unrelated concepts: overreach means exceeding proper limits, fluctuate means changing unpredictably, and constrain means restricting. That matches choice D — D is correct.
